sizing_rule.note: Position sizing algorithm that reduces/eliminates positions when current drawdown exceeds 3 standard deviations from mean. Max position size 3% of capital when conditions met. Uses statistical risk measures as gating mechanism before position entry.

source_rule_text: A trader should implement a position-sizing algorithm to avoid taking positions when market conditions or statistical risk measures indicate the trade should not be taken, rather than relying on signal generation alone.
